title: Forms Processed at a USCIS Lockbox | USCIS
content:
## Forms Processed at a USCIS Lockbox
The list below shows all forms processed at a USCIS lockbox.
When filing with a USCIS Lockbox, you may pay the filing fees with a credit, debit, or prepaid card using Form G-1450, Authorization for Credit Card Transactions, or by making an ACH debit payment from a U.S. banking account using Form G-1650, Authorization for ACH Transactions .
If you qualify for an exemption to pay with a paper-based method (a personal or business check, money order, bank draft, or cashier’s check), you will need to submit Form G-1651, Exemption for Paper Fee Payment .  See the Form G-1651, Exemption for Paper Fee Payment form, page for more information.
Visit our Filing Fees webpage for more detailed information.
For help calculating your fees, use our Fee Calculator . Our fee calculator will always have the most up-to-date fee information and can determine the exact filing and biometric services fee (where applicable) for any form processed at a USCIS Lockbox.
